summary: Implemented FeishuClient with 3 API endpoints (get_user_info, send_message, list_calendar_events). Includes FeishuResponse dataclass, error classification (network/auth/param/rate_limit/server), and 22 unit tests all passing with mocked HTTP.

details.test_coverage: success paths, param validation, auth errors, rate limits, server errors, network failures, empty results, JSON parse errors
